meaning: n.<苏格兰>孤岩,碎礁,低小岛
examples: Whatever skerry or reef you land on, Alas, my love, that I cannot be by you.
Skerry A leaping manta ray (Manta birostris) seems to fly above the Gulf of California off the coast of Mexico.
And then, camera in hand, Skerry dives between the ice floes into the waters of the Sea of Okhotsk, bordering the Shiretoko Peninsula.
